item.title: Kicking off match day with carne asada tacos and Red Blend. St...
item.description:
Kicking off match day with carne asada tacos and Red Blend. Stock up on Ménage à Trois wine for your watch party! 🍷⚽️   INGREDIENTS:  For the marinade -Ménage à Trois Red Blend -Skirt or flank steak -Limes -Orange -Garlic -Olive oil -Cumin -Dried oregano -Smoked paprika -Salt -Black pepper   For the salsa verde -Tomatillos -White onion -Jalapeño and/or serrano pepper -Garlic -Fresh cilantro -Lime -Salt   For the tacos -Corn tortillas   Optional toppings:  -Avocado or guacamole -Cotija cheese -Fresh salsa verde -Cilantro -White onion -Crema -Squeeze of lime juice  -Pickled onions 
@Menage Wines #menageatroispartner #MatchDay #football
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
